payload.answer: SQL debug/admin execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false.
citations: Input command: /brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards

entity_resolution.reason: No entity resolution needed for an administrative SQL request.

details: Blocked execution because SQL debug access is disabled by configuration.
No memory was created, updated, or deleted.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=true in a permitted debug environment and retry.
Use non-SQL administrative or diagnostic commands if available.
Check application logs or existing debug tooling instead of direct SQL execution.

raw_text: {"intent":"admin_sql_request","decision":"deny","memory_cards":[],"entity_resolution":{"action":"none","entity_id":null,"reason":"No entity resolution needed for an administrative SQL request."},"conflict_classification":"none","answer":"SQL debug/admin execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false.","citations":["Input command: /brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards","Configuration: BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false"],"repair_options":["Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=true in a permitted debug environment and retry.","Use non-SQL administrative or diagnostic commands if available.","Check application logs or existing debug tooling instead of direct SQL execution."],"receipt":{"success":false,"details":["Recognized an administrative SQL request.","Blocked execution because SQL debug access is disabled by configuration.","No memory was created, updated, or deleted."]}}
